caption: A static outdoor scene shows a dark, stone pedestal topped with a spherical sculpture, set against a background of lush green foliage and weeping willow branches. Overlaid on the left side of the scene in a white, stylized font is the question, "WHAT ACCOUNTS FOR CHANGE ACCORDING TO THE ATOMISTS?". The composition remains completely still across the sequence, with no people present and no movement in the foliage or the camera. The text remains fixed in place, maintaining the same position and wording throughout the duration. The lighting is consistent, highlighting the texture of the stone and the vibrant greenery of the garden setting.
